subject: A massive horned beast standing in a deep forest, broad-shouldered with curved horns sweeping forward and upward, thick dark hide, heavy hooves planted in undergrowth.
description: A hulking quadrupedal beast dominates the frame in a dense, sun-dappled forest. Its silhouette is bovine/rhinoceros-like — broad chest, hunched shoulders, short stocky legs ending in heavy hooves. A pair of long, curved horns sweep forward from its skull, with smaller secondary horns or bony ridges along the brow. The hide is a mottled dark brown, almost black in the shadows, with hints of moss-green tint where filtered light catches it. The beast's posture is grounded and aggressive, head lowered, eyes catching a small highlight. Behind it, towering tree trunks rise into a canopy, with dappled green-gold light breaking through dense foliage. The foreground is cluttered with ferns and forest-floor brush.
foreground: horned beast standing in forest underbrush; ferns and ground cover at its hooves
background: dense forest canopy with vertical tree trunks and dappled green light filtering through leaves
emotion: aggressive, grounded, territorial; head lowered in a charge-ready posture
